steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence claims the pseudonym "accomplished far more than simply concealing his authorship." The second sentence reinforces and elaborates: it wasn't an arbitrary pen name but a complex rhetorical strategy. The second sentence confirms and intensifies the first.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Indeed signals confirmation and intensification — exactly this relationship. Conversely and However signal contrast (wrong direction), and In addition introduces a new point rather than reinforcing the same one.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
